opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My head feels like it's going to physically explode, and there are blurry grey spots all over my vision.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe headache with visual disturbance and confusion, with very high home blood pressure readings.

symptom_narrative.onset: severe headache started 6 hours ago, worsening confusion over the last 2 hours
symptom_narrative.character: bursting, unremitting headache with visual grey spots
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: feels like my head is going to explode
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: large blind spots in both eyes, mild shortness of breath, one episode of vomiting, spouse says she is repeating questions and seems very confused
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: known hypertension, stopped her blood pressure tablets (perindopril and amlodipine) two weeks ago because she felt fine
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: sitting slumped on the couch, rubbing her temples, unable to mobilise

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spouse present and very concerned, home blood pressure machine repeatedly showing readings above 210/120

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: spouse wants to know if he should just give her an extra blood pressure tablet

access_barriers.transport: spouse present but patient too unwell to safely self-transport
